rationale: Educ. Code §25.041 governs school transfer rights for children of state supported living center employees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value.
quote: Sec. 25.041. TRANSFER OF CHILDREN OR WARDS OF EMPLOYEES OF STATE SUPPORTED LIVING CENTERS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
